rules.headings: Use tracking-tight for all headings. Never use Inter for headings.
rules.labels: Uppercase, tiny text with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

marketing.spacing: Use p-8 to p-24 for sections. Generous breathing room.

dashboard.spacing: Use p-6 for cards. Dense, functional spacing.

components.cards: Subtle border (border-border), flat solid background, rounded-xl. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or smooth rounded (rounded-lg) for dashboard. Primary buttons must use the blue brand color with white text. Apply smooth transition for background color and transform.
components.inputs: Shadcn default styles, customized with brand focus ring (focus:ring-blue-500).
components.header: Crystal Glass effect: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/20, shadow-sm.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient + direct shadows for floating elements.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used for sticky headers and modal overlays (backdrop-blur-xl).
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders using border-slate-200 (light) or border-slate-800 (dark).

motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must have hover states. E.g. hover:bg-slate-100 or scale-105 for images.
motion.transitions: Use specific transitions like 'transition-colors', 'transition-transform' with 'duration-200 ease-out'. NO 'transition-all'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text. Use text shadow over images.
accessibility.focus: High contrast focus states for all form inputs and buttons.
accessibility.aria: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

hero_backgrounds.description: A luxury car driving down a road at sunset. Use for the main public landing page hero section.

fleet_cars.description: White Porsche SUV parked inside a modern showroom. Use as thumbnail for fleet management and booking car selection.
A white car parked in a showroom. Use as thumbnail for fleet management and booking car selection.

services_features.description: Joyful couple holding keys in a dealership showroom. Use for the 'Seamless Handover' or 'Customer Trust' section on the landing page.
Detailed view of a modern car dashboard. Use for the 'Premium Fleet' or 'Quality Assured' features section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Outfit for all headings and Manrope for body text.
Ensure dark/light mode toggle exists as users may prefer different themes for SaaS.
Build the dashboard using high density grids (grid-cols-4) with no unnecessary full-screen gradients.
Use Shadcn components for forms, tables, modals, and date pickers. Heavily customize them to fit the blue theme.
Implement the landing page with pure HTML+Tailwind for layout to allow asymmetrical, dynamic designs.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
Use Phosphor icons for a modern, crisp look in the dashboard.
Apply 'Crystal Glass' effect (backdrop-blur-xl + high opacity bg + thin border) to sticky headers.
Do NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
Create separate .js files for UI components, not .tsx.
Create the specific functionalities exactly as the user specified: Fleet CRUD, Bookings Calendar, Contract Management with PDF, etc.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Always add transitions for specific properties excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is forbidden).
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui. Create new components that match their style.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
general_ui_ux_guidelines: Ensure a clean, reliable, and trustworthy interface suitable for car rental businesses. High contrast text, explicit hover states, no pure black/white without slight tinting. Focus on clear typography and structured bento-grids for data.
